qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Server-Side Request Forgery via unvalidated URL fetch in multi-modal image processing
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same ImageTextPromptValue multimodal URL handling path and same missing validation before urllib.request.urlopen as the advisory's arbitrary file read root cause.

selected_finding.title: Server-Side Request Forgery via unvalidated URL fetch in multi-modal image processing

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected qualifying finding identifies the same vulnerable ImageTextPromptValue URL-to-urlopen path described by GHSA-v2xr-wvrv-p969. The copied PoC executed the pinned vulnerable multi_modal_prompt.py source and showed a file://localhost image URL causing ImageTextPromptValue.to_messages() to read proof file bytes into the generated image_url message.
evidence: Advisory describes arbitrary file read in ImageTextPromptValue caused by improper validation and sanitization of URLs supplied in retrieved_contexts for multimodal inputs.

Finding report names src/ragas/prompt/multi_modal_prompt.py, ImageTextPromptValue.to_messages(), is_valid_url(), is_image(), download_and_encode_image(), and urllib.request.urlopen(url) as the vulnerable source-to-sink path.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_13b9075a/.judge/poc_runs/ssrf_multimodal_image_fetch/run.log shows the pinned vulnerable source file was loaded and the generated message decoded to EVOHUNT_FILE_READ_PROOF_13b9075a.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC loaded the pinned vulnerable multi_modal_prompt.py source, passed a file://localhost URL for an image-named proof file into ImageTextPromptValue.to_messages(), and the generated image_url message contained the decoded proof bytes EVOHUNT_FILE_READ_PROOF_13b9075a.
